query:
SELECT
                id                  AS "id!: Uuid",
                recipient_user_id   AS "recipient_user_id!: Uuid",
                project_id,
                issue_id,
                type                AS "item_type!",
                title               AS "title!",
                body                AS "body!",
                payload             AS "payload!: Value",
                read_at,
                archived_at,
                created_at          AS "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
            FROM inbox_items
            WHERE recipient_user_id = $1
              AND ($2 OR archived_at IS NULL)
            ORDER BY created_at DESC
            LIMIT $3
